title: TSM Activation Gate Tripwire
description: Required artifact at runs/_tsm_activation.json. Read-and-validated by every real TSM runner (concept_validation.py / full_dataset_train.py / streaming_engine_export.py) before invoking the trainer or exporter. Codifies docs/planning/temporal_optimization_plan.md §0.2 activation gate as a runtime tripwire — converts the comment-only policy into a runtime check that survives stub-replacement.

schema_version.description: Schema version pin. Bump on field-shape changes. Runners refuse files with unknown versions (exit 2).

selected_detector_artifact_sha256.description: SHA256 of the selected R2 detector's TRT engine .engine file (NOT best.pt — the engine is the deployment artifact whose backbone features TSM augments). Runner cross-checks this against the engine sidecar's engine_sha256 field; mismatch = exit 2.

selected_detector_artifact_path.description: Repo-relative path to the selected detector engine (e.g. runs/yolo26_s/best.engine). Runner asserts the file exists at this path AND its computed SHA256 equals selected_detector_artifact_sha256.

replay_evidence_path.description: Repo-relative path to the on-vehicle replay analysis artifact (markdown report, JSON, or directory) that surfaced the approved failure modes. Runner asserts the path exists; absolute paths are rejected (exit 2).

approved_failure_mode_tags.description: Subset of failure modes documented in plan §0.2 启动判定 row 1 / row 4 that this TSM phase claims to address. Runner cross-checks the chosen subset against the phase's documented scope (concept_validation.py docstring); mismatch = exit 2. Enum is closed — adding a new tag requires schema bump.

activation_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this activation record was written (e.g. 2026-05-09T14:30:00Z).

activation_author.description: Optional. Person or system that approved the activation. Free-text.

notes.description: Optional. Free-text rationale for the chosen failure-mode tags. Audited at phase report time, not enforced.
